articles.title: Abbas bags five but Mushfiqur 71, Taskin cameo propel Bangladesh
articles.description: Bangladesh lost 6 for 75 to be bowled out for 413, as Abbas bagged four wickets on day two

articles.title: Allen's 47-ball ton powers KKR to huge win over DC
articles.description: KKR's spinners restricted DC to just 142, and Allen gunned that total down almost singlehandedly

articles.title: BCCI pulls up IPL teams and owners for misconduct, protocol breaches during the season
articles.description: The advisory said "unauthorised visitors" in hotel rooms posed risks to players getting "compromised" and limited owner interactions with players during a live match

articles.title: Babar ruled out of first Bangladesh Test due to left knee injury
articles.description: PCB did not specify whether he would be ruled out of the series altogether, stating that his condition was being monitored by the team's medical panel

articles.title: Former India Under-19 cricketer Amanpreet Singh Gill dies at 36
articles.description: Amanpreet Singh Gill played youth one-dayers and a three-day Test in 2007, touring England, Malaysia and Sri Lanka with the India Under-19 team in that period

articles.title: Australia A men to tour India in September-October ahead of 2027 Test tour
articles.description: Australia A women and Australia men's Under-19s will also tour India in September and October

articles.title: India to host Zimbabwe for maiden women's bilateral series
articles.description: Tour comprises three T20Is and three ODIs in October

articles.title: Ahmedabad, not Bengaluru, to host IPL 2026 final
articles.description: Dharamsala will stage Qualifier 1 while New Chandigarh will host the Eliminator and Qualifier 2

articles.title: Hardie owns big stage to help Zalmi lift second PSL title
articles.description: Australia allrounder took four wickets and followed up with unbeaten half-century to help see off Kingsmen

articles.title: Teenager Thomas stars on debut as century buries Sussex
articles.description: Precocious display leaves visitors with mountain to climb on final day

articles.title: Sanju Samson emerges as contender for India captaincy after Suryakumar Yadav
articles.description: Samson is favoured over Shreyas Iyer due to his familiarity with the set-up.

articles.title: Punjab Kings staff member to join India's backroom team as spin-bowling coach
articles.description: Bahutule has already held talks with head coach Gautam Gambhir and other senior members within the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI).
